contentPattern.structure: header row of comparison column labels + repeated rows of (row-header label + one value cell per column)

suitableFor: side-by-side product/loan feature comparison tables (e.g. SBA 7(a) vs SBA 504)
spec / plan comparison matrices with a labelled row-header per row
notSuitableFor: repeating image+text card grids (use cards-image / cards-icons)
free-form data tables without comparison columns
